allow:
Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
feat: initialize nestjs 11 project with typescript strict mode

- Configure TypeScript strict mode with path aliases
- Setup ESLint 9 flat config + Prettier
- Add environment configuration with Joi validation
- Implement standard response format { code, message, data }
- Add ResponseTransformInterceptor for consistent responses
- Add AllExceptionsFilter for error handling
- Configure Swagger/OpenAPI at /api/docs
- Add CORS with configurable origins
EOF
\)")

Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
feat\(database\): implement Phase 02 database and Supabase integration

- Add TypeORM with PostgreSQL driver and Supabase JS SDK
- Create 11 entity files: Language, User, UserLanguage, Lesson, Exercise,
  UserProgress, UserExerciseAttempt, Subscription, AiConversation,
  AiConversationMessage, DeviceToken
- Configure DatabaseModule with connection pooling and SSL
- Add TypeORM data source for migrations CLI
- Create initial schema migration with enums and indexes
- Create RLS policies migration for row-level security
- Add language seed data \(10 languages\)
- Implement SupabaseStorageService for audio file storage
- Add migration npm scripts
- Create SQL file for manual Supabase SQL Editor execution
EOF
\)")

Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
feat\(core\): implement Phase 04 core modules with User and Language APIs

- Add UserModule with CRUD operations and language association
- Create UserController with endpoints: GET /users/me, PATCH /users/me, POST /users/languages, DELETE /users/languages/:id
- Implement UserService with profile management and language association logic
- Add 5 DTOs for user operations: UpdateProfileDto, GetProfileResponseDto, AddLanguageDto, UserLanguageDto, RemoveLanguageResponseDto
- Add LanguageModule with language listing functionality
- Create LanguageController with endpoint: GET /languages
- Implement LanguageService with language retrieval and validation
- Add 2 DTOs for language operations: LanguageDto, GetLanguagesResponseDto
- Register UserModule and LanguageModule in AppModule
- Update phase-04-core-modules.md status to DONE
EOF
\)")

Bash(cat /Users/tienthanh/Documents/new_flowering/be_flowering/package.json | python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('engines:', d.get\('engines',{}\)\); print\('main:', d.get\('main',''\)\); print\('scripts:', json.dumps\(d.get\('scripts',{}\), indent=2\)\)")

Bash(cat /Users/tienthanh/Documents/new_flowering/be_flowering/package.json | python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('devDeps:', json.dumps\(d.get\('devDependencies',{}\), indent=2\)\)")

Bash(git add Procfile package.json && git commit -m "$\(cat <<'EOF'
feat\(deployment\): add Railway production configuration

- Add Procfile with node entry point for Railway deployment
- Specify Node.js >=20.0.0 engine requirement in package.json
EOF
\)" && git push origin dev)

Bash(railway --version 2>&1 && cat ~/.railway/config.json | python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('token present:', bool\(d.get\('user',{}\).get\('token'\)\)\); print\('projects:', list\(d.get\('projects',{}\).keys\(\)\)\)")

Bash(python3 -c "
import json

config_path = '/Users/tienthanh/.railway/config.json'
with open\(config_path\) as f:
    config = json.load\(f\)

config['projects']['/Users/tienthanh/Documents/new_flowering/be_flowering'] = {
    'projectPath': '/Users/tienthanh/Documents/new_flowering/be_flowering',
    'name': 'Flowering',
    'project': '07f2a985-3a29-4b1c-905f-1cff8e062d0c',
    'environment': '556232a2-6495-4221-9c88-a454977a687b',
    'environmentName': 'dev',
    'service': 'c6d17dfd-4b30-4f63-bdfc-24fe3c676f63'
}

with open\(config_path, 'w'\) as f:
    json.dump\(config, f, indent=2\)
print\('Done'\)
")

Bash(npm info @langchain/google-genai versions --json 2>/dev/null | python3 -c "import sys,json; vs=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\([v for v in vs if v.startswith\('0.2'\) or v.startswith\('0.1'\)][-5:]\); print\('latest:', vs[-1]\)")

Bash(for pkg in "@langchain/anthropic@1.3.13" "@langchain/openai@1.2.4" "langchain@1.2.16" "@langchain/google-genai@2.1.20"; do
  echo "=== $pkg ==="
  npm info "$pkg" peerDependencies 2>/dev/null
done)
Bash(npm info langfuse-langchain dist-tags.latest 2>/dev/null && npm info langfuse-langchain peerDependencies 2>/dev/null)

Bash(npm info langfuse-langchain versions --json 2>/dev/null | python3 -c "import sys,json; vs=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(vs[-5:]\)"
npm info langfuse-langchain@latest peerDependencies 2>/dev/null)
Bash(git add .npmrc && git commit -m "fix\(deps\): add npmrc with legacy-peer-deps to resolve LangChain peer dependency conflicts" && git push origin dev)
Bash(git add src/main.ts && git commit -m "fix\(core\): bind to IPv4 for Railway deployment compatibility" && git push origin dev)
Bash(git stash show -p stash@{0} 2>&1 | git apply --ignore-whitespace 2>&1)

Bash(git stash show -p stash@{0} -- src/config/app-configuration.ts src/config/environment-validation-schema.ts src/database/database.module.ts src/database/entities/index.ts src/modules/auth/auth.controller.ts src/modules/auth/auth.module.ts src/modules/auth/auth.service.ts src/modules/auth/auth.service.spec.ts src/modules/auth/dto/index.ts src/modules/onboarding/dto/index.ts src/modules/onboarding/onboarding.service.spec.ts src/modules/onboarding/onboarding.service.ts .env.example 2>&1 | git apply --ignore-whitespace 2>&1)
Bash(npx swc src/instrument.ts src/main.ts src/app.module.ts --out-dir /tmp/sentry-check 2>&1 || npx tsc --noEmit --skipLibCheck src/instrument.ts 2>&1 | head -20)
Bash(npm cache clean --force 2>&1 && rm package-lock.json && npm install 2>&1 | tail -10)
Bash(git remote set-url origin git@github.com:dotienthanhdtt/BE_Flowering.git && git push)
Bash(cat logs/*.log 2>/dev/null || echo "No log files found")
